title: katapauo #2664
definition:
1) to make quiet, to cause to be at rest, to grant rest
    1a) to lead to a quiet abode
    1b) to still, restrain, to cause (one striving to do something)
        to desist
 2) to rest, take rest
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to make quiet, to cause to be at rest, to grant rest
    1a) to lead to a quiet abode
    1b) to still, restrain, to cause (one striving to do something)
        to desist
 2) to rest, take rest

    NASB:  to cause to cease, to rest:
